track-width.$description: dimension used by the switch component for track width.

track-height.$description: dimension used by the switch component for track height.

thumb-size.$description: dimension used by the switch component for thumb size.

thumb-inset.$description: dimension used by the switch component for thumb inset.

gap.$description: dimension used by the switch component for gap.

track-radius.$description: dimension used by the switch component for track radius.

thumb-radius.$description: dimension used by the switch component for thumb radius.

border-width.$description: dimension used by the switch component for border width.

min-target.$description: dimension used by the switch component for min target.

track.$description: color used by the switch component for unchecked rest track.

thumb.$description: color used by the switch component for unchecked rest thumb.

border.$description: color used by the switch component for unchecked rest border.

track.$description: color used by the switch component for unchecked hover track.

thumb.$description: color used by the switch component for unchecked hover thumb.

border.$description: color used by the switch component for unchecked hover border.

track.$description: color used by the switch component for unchecked active track.

thumb.$description: color used by the switch component for unchecked active thumb.

border.$description: color used by the switch component for unchecked active border.

track.$description: color used by the switch component for unchecked disabled track.

thumb.$description: color used by the switch component for unchecked disabled thumb.

border.$description: color used by the switch component for unchecked disabled border.

track.$description: color used by the switch component for checked rest track.

thumb.$description: color used by the switch component for checked rest thumb.

border.$description: color used by the switch component for checked rest border.

track.$description: color used by the switch component for checked hover track.

thumb.$description: color used by the switch component for checked hover thumb.

border.$description: color used by the switch component for checked hover border.

track.$description: color used by the switch component for checked active track.

thumb.$description: color used by the switch component for checked active thumb.

border.$description: color used by the switch component for checked active border.

track.$description: color used by the switch component for checked disabled track.

thumb.$description: color used by the switch component for checked disabled thumb.

border.$description: color used by the switch component for checked disabled border.

color.$description: color used by the switch component for focus ring color.

width.$description: dimension used by the switch component for focus ring width.

offset.$description: dimension used by the switch component for focus ring offset.

shadow.$description: shadow used by the switch component for the focus ring glow (MarsUI Focus/primary: 3px spread ring at 40% — specs/002-ki-button/design-extraction.md §2.5, same double mechanism as ki-button: glow plus the opaque indicator).
